The '''Daranc Run''' was a heavily traveled [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] located in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. This route cut directly through the [[Corva sector/Legends|Corva sector]], and the planet [[Betha II]] marked the halfway point of the route. It presumably also passed through the [[Daranc system/Legends|Daranc system]].<ref name="Journal" />

==Appearances==
